text: I feel an almost otherworldly sense of curiosity and anticipation. The interplay of light, glass, and bold text invites me deeper into this environment—a harmonious blend of human innovation and thoughtful design. The R+D display hints at inquiry and transformation, and as I absorb my surroundings, I am drawn to reflect on my own place as both an observer and a participant in an ongoing story of progress. The odd angles and shimmering surfaces heighten my awareness, making the experience surreal but quietly invigorating.
